title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Zara India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Zara India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
